full_text:
Zuo Xian 左咸
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zuo Xian (左咸). Reminds Sun Quan of how well Cao Cao treated Guan Yu, to no avail. Zuo Xian is a fictional character. Zuo Xian was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
